channel.title: IELTS on A minimal Hugo website
channel.description: Recent content in IELTS on A minimal Hugo website

item.title: WordPronuciation
item.description: heÁöĄŚľĪŤĮĽ there he is = [there rui iz] who is he [hu aizi] did he = [di di] but if he = [bu di fi] but he = [bu di] what he = [wha di] food is he = [foo di zi] does he = [de zi] believe he = [believ di] is he = [i zi] what's he = [wh Ć tsi] what'd he = [wh Ć di] guess he = [ge si] because he = [bi cuzi] who's he = [hu zi] himÁöĄŚľĪŤĮĽ told him = [tol d…úm] aboudt hime = [abou d…úm] leave him alone = [li v…ú ma long] got him = [g Ć d…úm] give him up = [gi v…ú map] let him in = [l…ú d…ú min] want him = [wan n…úm] met him = [me d…úm] killed him = [kill d…úm] put him = [pu d…úm] themÁöĄŚľĪŤĮĽ get them = [ge d…úm] took them off = [too k…ú moff] put them all = [pu d…ú m…Ēl] had them = [h√¶ d…úm] rub them all = [r Ć b…ú m…Ēl] take them = [ta k…úm] put them up = [pu d…ú m Ćp] rack them up = [ra k…ú m Ćp] one of them = [w Ć n…ú v…úm] look at them = [loo k…ú d…úm] ate them all = [a t…ú m…Ēl] want them = [wan n…úm] love them = [l Ć v…úm] herÁöĄŚľĪŤĮĽ send her in = [sen d…ôr rin] tell her = [t…ú l…ôr] with her = [wi th…ôr] told her = [tol d…ôr] get her = [ge d…ôr] call her = [call d…ôr] like her = [li k…ôr] let her = [l…ú d…ôr] dangle gave her a = .
